calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-01-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)
